preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Immunology Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete immunology workflow from sample reception to archiving

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Immunology Laboratory Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Immunology Laboratory notebook template with 9 predefined workflow pages for sample processing, analysis, and archiving.

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Reception page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Reception

column.name: instructions
column.value: Verify sample receipt and condition. Check that all samples match the manifest. Inspect for damage, proper labeling, and temperature compliance.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Reception - Batch verification of incoming samples

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Initial Processing page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Initial Processing

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform initial processing steps including centrifugation and visual inspection. Record any quality issues.

column.name: content
column.value: Initial Processing - Centrifugation and sample preparation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Additional Assays page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Additional Assays

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record test type, operator, reagents used, and results

column.name: content
column.value: Additional Assays - Supplementary tests prior to extraction

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Child Sample Creation page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Child Sample Creation

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create child samples for specific test requirements. Route samples to appropriate destinations (internal analysis, external lab, or storage).

column.name: content
column.value: Child Sample Creation - Branching workflow for sample routing

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Plate Setup page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Plate Setup

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign samples to analyzer plates with well coordinates. Use row-major ordering (A1, A2...B1, B2...).

column.name: content
column.value: Plate Setup - Well coordinate assignment for analyzer

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Analyzer Results page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Analyzer Results

column.name: instructions
column.value: Import analyzer results from CSV/Excel. Match results to samples by well coordinate or sample ID. Review and validate results.

column.name: content
column.value: Analyzer Results - Import and match analyzer output

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Post-Analysis page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform post-analysis review and quality checks. Flag any outliers or failed QC samples for repeat testing.

column.name: content
column.value: Post-Analysis - Individual sample review and QC

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Create Compilation page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Compile final results and prepare for reporting. Aggregate data from all test runs.

column.name: content
column.value: Compilation - Aggregate results for reporting

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 8

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 9

changeSet.comment: Create Archiving page for Immunology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Archive samples and finalize documentation. Assign storage locations and complete audit trail.

column.name: content
column.value: Archiving - Final storage assignment and documentation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Immunology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 9
